[[General/Legends|General]] '''Rand Talor''' was a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] officer who participated in the [[Liberation of Coruscant (Galactic Civil War)|Liberation of Coruscant]]. Having lost his wife, [[Kath Talor]], to [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Tal Ashen]], he managed to liberate the [[Imperial Palace/Legends|Imperial Palace]] and find her imprisoned.

==Behind the scenes==
Rand Talor was voiced by [[John Cygan]] in ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''.

''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' also features the Liberation of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], but in that game the assault on the Imperial Palace is commanded by [[Brenn Tantor]]. The most likely explanation is that the two commanded separate, simultaneous assaults from different directions, or that Talor commanded the force from the ground while Tantor issued him orders from orbit via the [[Battlefield Holographic Control Interface|BHCI]]. This arrangement was used between Tantor and [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Veers]] during the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]].
